summary: Tested Admin Product Management (CRUD) and Admin Order Management features. Backend: 17/18 tests passed (1 skipped). Frontend: All Admin pages tested successfully. Fixed 2 backend bugs related to MongoDB ObjectId serialization.
passed_tests: Backend: Admin login returns is_admin=True
Backend: GET /api/admin/stats returns all metrics (total_orders, total_revenue, pending/processing/shipped counts, total_products, total_customers)
Backend: /api/admin/stats requires admin authentication (401)
Backend: GET /api/admin/products returns list of products (45 products)
Backend: GET /api/admin/products?search=calm filters products by search term
Backend: GET /api/admin/products?pet_type=dog filters by pet type
Backend: GET /api/admin/products?category=supplements filters by category
Backend: POST /api/admin/products creates new product with correct ID
Backend: PUT /api/admin/products/{id} updates product while preserving ID
Backend: DELETE /api/admin/products/{id} removes product (returns 404 after)
Backend: /api/admin/products requires admin authentication (401)
Backend: GET /api/admin/orders returns all orders (5 orders)
Backend: GET /api/admin/orders?status=pending filters by status
Backend: PATCH /api/admin/orders/{id}?status=processing updates order status
Backend: /api/admin/orders requires admin authentication (401)
Backend: POST /api/admin/orders/{id}/tracking adds tracking info with carrier/tracking_number
Backend: /api/admin/orders/{id}/tracking requires admin authentication
Frontend: Admin Dashboard shows stats cards (Revenue, Orders, Products, Customers)
Frontend: Admin Dashboard has navigation buttons (Orders, Products, Promotions, AI Agents)
Frontend: Admin Products page displays products table with 45 products
Frontend: Admin Products page has search input, pet type filter, category filter
Frontend: Add Product button opens dialog with all required fields
Frontend: Add Product dialog has Name, Slug, Price, Category, Pet Type, Save button
Frontend: Edit Product dialog opens with pre-populated data
Frontend: Delete Product confirmation dialog shows warning message
Frontend: Admin Orders page displays 5 orders with status filters
Frontend: Order status filters (All, Pending, Processing, Shipped) work correctly
Frontend: Order Update dropdown shows all status options
Frontend: View Order dialog shows order details, items, totals, tracking info

bugs_fixed.cause: MongoDB ObjectId (_id) was being included in JSON response causing PydanticSerializationError
bugs_fixed.fix: Added product_dict.pop('_id', None) before returning response in create_product endpoint

bugs_fixed.issue: PUT /api/admin/products/{id} replacing product ID with new generated ID
bugs_fixed.cause: Product model's id field has default_factory that generates new UUID, overwriting original ID
bugs_fixed.fix: Added product_dict['id'] = product_id to preserve original product ID during update

seed_data_creation: Multiple TEST_ prefixed products created during testing (cleaned up automatically). 5 orders exist in system (all shipped with tracking).
context_for_next_testing_agent: Admin Product Management CRUD fully working - Create/Read/Update/Delete all functional via /api/admin/products endpoints. Admin Orders Management working - status updates via PATCH /api/admin/orders/{id}?status={status}, tracking via POST /api/admin/orders/{id}/tracking?carrier={}&tracking_number={}. Frontend pages AdminProductsPage.jsx and AdminOrdersPage.jsx both have proper data-testid attributes. All orders currently have 'shipped' status with tracking info.

mocked_apis.Resend Email API: RESEND_API_KEY not configured - shipping notification emails won't be sent
mocked_apis.17Track API: TRACK17_API_KEY not configured - tracking info stored locally

admin_products_api.list: GET /api/admin/products - returns all products with filters (search, pet_type, category)
admin_products_api.get: GET /api/admin/products/{id} - returns single product by ID
admin_products_api.create: POST /api/admin/products - creates new product, returns {message, id, product}

admin_orders_api.list: GET /api/admin/orders - returns all orders, supports ?status= filter

frontend_admin_products.testids: add-product-btn, search-input, pet-type-filter, category-filter, product-name-input, product-price-input, save-product-btn, edit-btn-{id}, delete-btn-{id}

frontend_admin_orders.testids: filter-all, filter-pending, filter-processing, filter-shipped, view-order-{id}, add-tracking-{id}
